name: Solio_Blockers_Permanent
description: Settled blocks — these never reopen on 'confirmation'. reason=private-access: real crossings closed at Solio's request; only Solio reversing that decision lifts one. reason=not-a-crossing: established there is no crossing here at all (the map mark at S06 is a toilet label) — nothing to reopen. GENERATED from crossing_decisions.json — do not hand-edit.

quote: Yes that is passable, was that in question?
S06 is not a passable position for the river, its just a label for the toilet, it is not a passable point to cross the river
why: NOT A CROSSING - SETTLED (James, 2026-07-23). The map mark at the S06 site is the
poster's TOILET symbol (orange dot per Jen's legend), not a river crossing. There is
no passable point to cross the river here. Cut is permanent.
How the earlier quotes got misread: 'S06 = Crossing' (2026-07-14) and 'Yes that is
passable' (2026-07-22, green-circle image) were both answers about a mark that turns
out to be the toilet label - 'passable' meaning you can drive UP to it, not across
the river. The 2026-07-23 'seasonal streams' reply reframed the circled marks, and
checking Jen's legend (orange = TOILET) settled it. Three review rounds said the
'crossing' reading was an over-read; they were right for a better reason than anyone
knew.
COST, NOW PERMANENT: the 15/36 POI-pair detours (all three Kingfisher recoveries,
worst case +1.60 km) are the true road network, not a pending recovery. Nothing is
unreachable. The planned guest-permission ask is CANCELLED - there is nothing to ask
permission about.
TOILET POI: this site is a located toilet - feeds the toilet-POI patch (D102/D104
carried item) instead of any unblock.

quote: S20 & S18 = Marriotts Private Road - May be a good idea to restrict access here
why: See S18. This is the crossing W of JW Marriott; the parked jw-bridge connector in
connectors.unconfirmed.geojson belongs here and must NOT be re-added for guest routing.

quote: S20 & S18 = Marriotts Private Road - May be a good idea to restrict access here
why: Crossing is real; access is the decision. Callan proposed the restriction himself, so this
is agreed on both sides, not a suggestion folded into scope.
SCOPE: the two CROSSINGS are cut, not 'the drive' - we have no geometry for the Marriotts
road as a whole. Cutting them leaves it as three dead-end spurs, so through-driving is
structurally impossible. JW Marriott stays reachable: it is a lodge guests sleep in.
